sources.title: HEC Curriculum of Nursing Education - BSN and MSN 2024
sources.scope: Official Generic BSN semester structure, credits, course titles and nursing course learning outcomes.

sources.title: Microbiology
sources.scope: Allied-health microbiology: organisms, transmission, detection, control, host response and laboratory foundations.

sources.title: Biology 2e
sources.scope: Biological macromolecules, enzymes, cellular energy, metabolism and cell signalling foundations.

sources.title: Anatomy and Physiology 2e
sources.scope: Homeostasis and the structure and function of integumentary, musculoskeletal, cardiovascular and digestive systems.

sources.title: Nursing Fundamentals, 2nd edition
sources.publisher: Open RN / Chippewa Valley Technical College; hosted by NCBI Bookshelf
sources.license: CC-BY-4.0 (some embedded activities carry separate notices)
sources.scope: Entry-level nursing scope, communication, nursing process, safety, culture, spiritual care and fundamental care concepts. Pakistan-specific scope claims require local review.

sources.title: Writing Guide with Handbook
sources.scope: Functional academic English, paragraphs, clear sentences, grammar, punctuation, audience, revision and source use.

sources.title: The Constitution of the Islamic Republic of Pakistan
sources.scope: Official constitutional text. Generated historical or interpretive claims must be distinguished from constitutional provisions.

sources.title: Undergraduate Education Policy, Version 1.1
sources.scope: HEC general-education framework and model-course context for Functional English, Pakistan Studies and ICT.

sources.title: Workplace Software and Skills
sources.scope: Computer literacy, internet research, cloud concepts, word processing, spreadsheets, presentations and collaboration tools.
